name: Ala Moana Beach Park Playground
tagline: Huge playground right next to the calmest beach in Honolulu — the ultimate combo for families.
parking: Free parking lot in the park (fills fast on weekends — arrive before 10am)
hours: Park open 4am–10pm daily; playground always accessible during park hours
bestTime: Weekday mornings for parking and shade; late afternoon for cooler play
talkStory: Perfect for ages 1-10. The playground has structures for toddlers and bigger kids with shade coverings. The real win is the beach — Ala Moana's reef-protected water is ankle-to-knee deep for a long way out, perfect for little ones. Pack a picnic, grab a spot under the trees, and you can easily spend a full day. Restrooms and outdoor showers on-site. The park has a paved path great for bikes and scooters too.
